results.title: DS 000189 ICM 20948 v1.5 | PDF | System On A Chip | Analog To Digital Converter
results.description: The ICM-20948 is a 9-axis MEMS motion tracking device that integrates a gyroscope, accelerometer, compass and digital motion processor. It is optimized for low power operation of 2.5mW.
results.content:
The ICM-20948 is a 9-axis MEMS motion tracking device that integrates a gyroscope, accelerometer, compass and digital motion processor. It is optimized for low power operation of 2.5mW.
The ICM-20948 is a 9-axis MEMS motion tracking device that integrates a gyroscope, accelerometer, compass and digital motion processor. It is optimized for low power operation of 2.5mW. The device measures 3mm x 3mm x 1mm and outputs motion data over I2C or SPI interfaces.
The ICM-20948 is a 9-axis MEMS motion tracking device that integrates a gyroscope, accelerometer, compass and digital motion processor. It is optimized for low power operation of 2.5mW. ICM-20948 · Document Number: DS-000189 Page 10 of 89 · Revision: 1.3 · 2 FEATURES · 2.1 GYROSCOPE FEATURES · The triple-axis MEMS gyroscope in the ICM-20948 includes the following features: • Digital-output X-, Y-, and Z-axis angular rate sensors (gyroscopes) with a user-programmable full-scale range ·
